description_long: This is a thick hardcover book with a predominantly white dust jacket, featuring a blue, spiked, tail-like illustration that wraps partially around the front cover. The book's edges show some wear, with the top edge of the dust jacket appearing slightly crumpled and the pages showing a hint of yellowing. The back cover contains several lines of printed text, including reviews and a barcode at the bottom. The spine is white with blue accents and displays the book's title and author in a vertical orientation, along with a small publisher mark at the base. The book appears to be of standard hardcover size, with a sturdy, rectangular form and a visible dust jacket. The overall appearance suggests a modern, well-used non-fiction book.
description: A thick, white hardcover book with a blue spiked illustration on the front and a slightly worn dust jacket. The spine and back cover feature printed text and subtle blue accents.
description_view_0: The book is viewed from the side, showing the thickness of the pages and the slightly crumpled top edge of the dust jacket.
description_view_1: The back cover is visible, displaying several lines of text, review quotes, and a barcode at the bottom.
description_view_2: The spine is shown, featuring vertical text in white and blue, with a small publisher mark at the base.
description_view_3: The front cover is visible, dominated by a blue, spiked illustration and large, bold title text.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a stylized blue, spiked tail or fin that curves upward from the lower left, rendered in a semi-abstract, painterly style. The illustration is bold and visually striking, set against a plain white background. No other imagery or decorative elements are present.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is white with blue accents and features vertically oriented text in a clean, sans-serif font. A small publisher mark is present at the bottom, and the blue illustration from the cover partially wraps onto the spine.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small, rectangular mark at the base of the spine, likely representing the publisher's logo, but no distinct design details are visible.
